name: aivc-dach
description: AI-first video editor + generator in one repo. Editor (OpenCut fork, Next.js + Bun), generator (HTML/CSS templates → MP4 via Puppeteer + ffmpeg), MCP server (Anthropic / OpenAI / Ollama via Vercel AI SDK).

scripts.install:all: cd editor && bun install && cd ../generator/renderer && npm install && cd ../../mcp-server && bun install
scripts.smoke: bun run smoke:generator && bun run smoke:mcp

author: ZELDOgiq & Media AI AT
